sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application Nos. 229 & 230 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 26 & 28. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 307/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 None present. This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress and it appears that even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Even otherwise applicant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
